title: Fix unzip-and-route.yml — graceful no-op when no zip
q_summary: Actions failed after SPEC-001 turns — fix unzip-and-route.yml workflow.
a_summary: Diagnosed root cause: workflow triggers on .github/turn-bundles/** path but our push_files commits touched .github/workflows/ and spaces/gists/, causing the workflow to run with no zip present and fail at unzip step. Fixed by adding skip=true guard in Find latest zip bundle step and gating all subsequent steps on skip != true. Workflow now exits cleanly as a no-op when no bundle is present.
decisions: Added 2>/dev/null to find command to suppress errors when turn-bundles dir is absent
Added skip output flag to find step
All processing steps gated with if: steps.find_zip.outputs.skip != 'true'
Added explicit no-op step that logs a friendly message when skipping
open_questions: Why did Turn 2 commit (unzip-and-route.yml change) trigger the workflow? The path filter is .github/turn-bundles/** not .github/workflows/** — may be a GitHub Actions path filter edge case or the Turn 3 commit touched a turn-bundles path incidentally.
